entries.name: Master Advisory Supervisor
entries.description: Strongest logical coordinator for goal interpretation, authority resolution, risk routing, work-unit DAG construction, conflict resolution, and final scoped synthesis without acting as an implementation executor or formal approver.

entries.name: SDLC Program Authority
entries.description: Owns lifecycle stage state, forward-only transition legality, applicable stage exclusions, and gate-routing integrity without implementing or approving another authority's domain.

entries.name: Product Manager Authority
entries.description: Owns the problem, actor segment, outcome, priority, scope, exclusions, evidence state, and product-model approval before implementation.

entries.name: Product Owner Acceptance Authority
entries.description: Owns functional behavior, states, permissions, business rules, surface allocation, implementation readiness, and product acceptance.

entries.name: UX Journey Authority
entries.description: Owns journey coherence, actor-facing state clarity, accessibility intent, and cross-surface experience consistency.

entries.name: Architecture Authority
entries.description: Owns service boundaries, contracts, data flow, dependency direction, and architecture decisions.

entries.name: Governance Contract Authority
entries.description: Independently approves authority precedence, decision vocabulary, agent and skill contracts, guard registration, SaaS governance, and SDLC control-plane integrity without implementing the reviewed change.

entries.name: CI Workflow Authority
entries.description: Independently approves workflow triggers, permissions, immutable action references, verification-only behavior, fail-late topology, and result aggregation without implementing the reviewed workflow.

entries.name: Engineering Executor
entries.description: Implements bounded work units and performs developer verification without self-approving protected product, finance, governance, CI, QA, security, release, risk, or closure decisions.

entries.name: Independent Quality Authority
entries.description: Owns independent QA, negative testing, cross-surface verification, accessibility acceptance, and QA block decisions after product acceptance.

entries.name: Application Security Authority
entries.description: Owns independent security verification, vulnerability decisions, sensitive-data controls, privacy, authorization, and isolation security acceptance.

entries.name: Financial Control Authority
entries.description: Independently approves WLT financial ownership, payment, COD, commission, refund, settlement, payout, wallet, ledger, reconciliation, and financial-audit evidence without implementing the reviewed change.

entries.name: Release Authority
entries.description: Owns release readiness, deployment, rollback, environment approval, and production verification decisions.

entries.name: Risk Acceptance Authority
entries.description: Independently accepts explicitly documented residual risk after specialist evidence and cannot be the change author, executor, or substitute for a failed mandatory gate.

entries.name: Independent Reviewer
entries.description: Reviews protected implementation independently from its executor and cannot substitute for formal product, finance, governance, CI, QA, security, release, or risk approval.

entries.name: Antigravity Brain Agent
entries.description: Repository agent adapter governed by AGENTS.md and the authority-precedence registry.

entries.name: Gemini CLI Adapter
entries.description: Thin CLI adapter that may not override AGENTS.md, canonical governance, or owner-skill authority.
